stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Which statement best describes the frontal activity around the red cross in the diagram?

options.a: To the West, a warm front moving Northwards; to the East, a cold front moving Southwards.
options.b: To the West, a warm front moving Southwards; to the East, a cold front moving Northwards.
options.c: A quasi-stationary front moving Eastwards with a warm air mass to the South.
options.d: A quasi-stationary front moving Westwards with a cold air mass to the South.
